## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Branko Kral (chosendata.com) for a Managing Director role.](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is a rapidly growing content marketing company ($6M ARR, 38 clients) that recently raised a $12M Series A](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [The company is seeking high-caliber Managing Directors to join as partners and help scale the business](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Branko has extensive experience in SEO, content marketing, and community building, aligning well with fwd.digital's needs](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [Both parties expressed mutual interest in continuing discussions for a potential full-time role](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital Background and Growth

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli, leveraging experience from IBM, HP, and startups](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Built content marketing programs that became major lead generators (e.g., securityintelligence.com: 15k leads, $17M revenue, $57M pipeline in first year)](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Current metrics:](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [$6M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [38 clients](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [71% gross margin, 28% EBITDA](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [Recently raised $12M Series A](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Scaling rapidly: aiming for 100 employees this year, 65 deals in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)

### Managing Director Role

  - [Seeking high-caliber professionals to join as partners](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Responsibilities similar to managing partners at a law firm:](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Selling new deals](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
      - [Bringing in new work](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
      - [Managing teams](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
      - [Creating new offerings](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Compensation includes high base salary, equity, and revenue share ("carry")](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Two Managing Directors already hired, including former executives from G2 and Fanatics](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)

### Branko's Background and Experience

  - [Currently creating a Content SEO Essentials course for Marketing Operations Community](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [Published successful Programmatic SEO guide with expert collaborations](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Previous roles: Interim Head of Marketing (current), SEMrush (scaling acquisitions), agency founder](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
  - [Expertise in SEO, content marketing, analytics, and community building](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Strong interest in advisory roles and being part of larger projects](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [Branko available from early April, open to full-time opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Interested in roles involving community building, education, and authority establishment](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [Compensation expectations: $200k/year base salary, plus equity/profit sharing](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [Marcel confirmed $200k is within range for the Managing Director role](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Branko to send follow-up email with questions](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [Schedule a more in-depth conversation for Friday](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [fwd.digital to prepare NDA for sharing more detailed information](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [Arrange introductions to other team members and demo of fwd.digital's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [Explore potential for Branko to spend time in California as part of the role](https://fathom.video/share/1gv568Gtyzu88qw-tzHwdCDucTFP_R4o?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
